items.meaning: Both competitors are _____________strong and fast. (surprised)
She can find the _____________ of the people everywhere she goes during her visit. (friend)
He treated them with _____________ and thoughtfulness. (generous)
She was really _____________ by the beauty of Ha Noi. (impression)
Among many different _____________ in Vietnam. Tet is considered the most important. (celebrate)
My father is well-known for his _____________. (generous)
You should call a plumber to fix that _____________ faucet. It'll cost you lots of money. (drip)
Tom spoiled my _____________ by telling the end of the film. (enjoy)
She got through her work with speed and _____________. (efficient)
Dad's words are always _____________. (persuade)
We will have a decorator _____________ our room with some roses. (beautiful)
Nowadays, the Internet is _____________ used. We can see many products advertised on it. (commerce)
Human beings are destroying the air by adding _____________ to it. (pollute)
I think all nations should live _____________ and take care of our planet. (peace)
We are _____________ to hear that bad news. (happy)
The Temple of Literature was _____________ built in 1070 in The Ly Dynasty. (origin)
Tom was _____________ in finding his lost bicycle, he decided to buy a new one. (succeed)
It would be more _____________ to turn off the air-conditioner before leaving. (economy)
Buckingham Palace is a major tourist _____________. (attract)
It was a beautiful piece of _____________ (embroider)
The two sides of the city are _____________ by the river. (separation)
This examination will test your _____________ in English. (proficient)
